name: chr11q11_pericentric_alpha_HSat
description: Chromosome 11 q-arm pericentric flank (11q11-11q12.1), the q-side sub-centromeric LCR shoreline. Hosts the 11q11 olfactory-receptor SD cluster distally. Alpha-satellite (D11Z1), pericentromeric SDs and HSat patches. Resolved in T2T-CHM13.

architecture.internal_structure: alpha-sat HOR + HSat patches + pericentromeric SD shoreline; distally adjoins 11q11 olfactory-receptor SD cluster.
